name: Baked Grits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Cook the grits according to package directions. Regular grits require 25 to 30 minutes of slow cooking; quick-cooking grits will take 3 to 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the cheese, butter, eggs, and milk.
4. Pour into a buttered 3-cup baking dish.
5. Bake for 40 minutes or longer, or until set.
